summary: AWS Phase E Integration Testing Complete - All 31 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend pages and navigation working correctly

issues: QuickSight shows 'Unavailable' badge and returns 503 - this is EXPECTED behavior as AWS account not subscribed to QuickSight

critical_code_review_comments: All Phase E backend services are properly implemented with lazy initialization pattern
All frontend pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Navigation links correctly added to Tools dropdown
Error handling is properly implemented - QuickSight 503 responses are expected and handled gracefully
seed_data_creation: Sentiment analysis created test records in comprehend_analyses collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: AWS Phase E (AI Analytics + Data Analytics + Managed Blockchain) is fully implemented and working. All services connect to real AWS in us-east-1. QuickSight returns 503 because AWS account not subscribed - this is expected. All other services (Comprehend, Personalize, Athena, Managed Blockchain) return live data. Frontend pages accessible at /aws-ai-analytics, /aws-data-analytics, /aws-blockchain via Tools dropdown.
